memoryArtifacts.headline: John Betts and Mary Bigge Bridge
memoryArtifacts.description:
John Betts and Mary Bigge Bridge

	John, of Hemmel Hemstead twenty-five miles outside of London, and Mary Bridge had two sons that came to America in 1634, Sir Thomas  who was 21 years old and Robert. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Betts of Bearsted, Kent於1576年9月23日在英國肯特比阿斯特德受洗時，他的父親Alexander Betts26歲，母親Joan Larkyn24歲。他於1596年12月26日與Mary在英國英格蘭肯特比阿斯特德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1620年8月8日在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆享年43歲，埋葬在英國肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Betts of Bearsted, Kent于1576年9月23日在英国肯特比阿斯特德受洗时，他的父亲Alexander Betts26岁，母亲Joan Larkyn24岁。他于1596年12月26日与Mary在英国英格兰肯特比阿斯特德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1620年8月8日在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆享年43岁，埋葬在英国肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Betts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bett , with excrescent -s, a patronymic or metronymic from the medieval personal name Bett, a short form of Bartholomew, Beatrice, or Elizabeth.

variants.name: Bettis
meanings: English: variant of Betts (see also Bett ), or possibly a topographic name meaning ‘(dweller) by the hollows’, from Old English bytt ‘butt, cask, flagon, womb’, used topographically like Old English byden ‘butt’ (compare Bidwell ).

variants.name: Bett
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Bett(e). When feminine it was usually a pet form of Beatrice but possibly also Elizabeth. When masculine it was a pet form of Bertram or Bertelmew (see Bartholomew ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Betts of Bearsted, Kent was christened on 23 September 1576, in Bearsted, Kent, England, his father, Alexander Betts, was 26 and his mother, Joan Larkyn, was 24. He married Mary on 26 December 1596, in Bearsted, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 August 1620, in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in West Peckham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Betts of Bearsted, Kent a été baptisé le 23 septembre 1576, à Bearsted, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Betts, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Larkyn, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mary le 26 décembre 1596, à Bearsted, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 août 1620, à West Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à West Peckham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Betts of Bearsted, Kent am 23. September 1576 in Bearsted, Kent, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Betts 26 und seine Mutter Joan Larkyn 24. Er hat am 26. Dezember 1596 in Bearsted, Kent, England, United Kingdom Mary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. August 1620 im Alter von 43 Jahren in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in West Peckham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Betts of Bearsted, Kent è stato battezzato il 23 settembre 1576 nel Bearsted, Kent, England, il suo padre, Alexander Betts, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Larkyn, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mary il 26 dicembre 1596, nel Bearsted, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Betts of Bearsted, Kentが1576年9月23日にイギリスケントビールステドで洗礼を受けた時，父Alexander Bettsは26歳，母Joan Larkynは24歳であった。1596年12月26日にイギリスイギリスケントビールステドでMaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1620年8月8日にイギリスイギリスケントウエスト ペックハムで43歳で死去し，イギリスケントウエスト ペックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Betts of Bearsted, Kent(이)가 1576년 9월 23일 영국 켄트 브이르스테드에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Betts(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Larkyn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1596년 12월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브이르스테드에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1620년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 펙함에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 웨스트 펙함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Betts of Bearsted, Kent был крещен 23 сентября 1576 г. в местности бирстед, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander Betts было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Larkyn, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary 26 декабря 1596 г. в местности бирстед, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 августа 1620 г. в местности вест пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности вест пеккхам, кэнт, Англия.
